DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_article_pubdate ON article;
DROP INDEX idx_article_pubdate ON article WHERE article_id IN (SELECT article_id FROM article WHERE publication_date < '2022-01-01');
DROP INDEX idx_order_status ON orders WHERE order_id IN (SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE status = 'canceled');
DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_comment_article ON comments WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM article WHERE article.id = comments.article_id);
